title: Quercus × lucombeana
intro: Quercus × lucombeana, also known as the Lucombe oak, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between English and Turkey oak trees. The health benefits of Quercus × lucombeana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties due to its high content of bioactive compounds. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Quercus × lucombeana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
taxonomy: Quercus × lucombeana is a hybrid oak tree, resulting from the cross between the English oak (Quercus robur) and the sessile oak (Quercus petraea). This hybrid is known for its unique characteristics and is widely cultivated for its timber and ornamental value. Quercus × lucombeana is classified as a deciduous tree, shedding its leaves seasonally, and is native to Europe. As a hybrid, it is not a naturally occurring species within the wild but is instead a cultivated variety. The classification of Quercus × lucombeana is further supported by its morphology, which exhibits a combination of characteristics from its parent species.
uses: Quercus × lucombeana is a hybrid of the English oak and the Turkey oak, and while its medicinal uses may not be well-documented, there are some potential applications of oak trees in general. The tannins present in oak bark have been used in traditional medicine for their astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. Oak bark has also been used to treat various conditions, including digestive issues and wounds. The bark's antiseptic properties may help to prevent infection and promote healing. More research is needed to confirm the specific medicinal uses of Quercus × lucombeana.

parts: Quercus × lucombeana bark and leaves are used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of various ailments such as fever and digestive issues.
